items.summary: Add a new 'Game' section/page to the frontend that embeds or links to the Boundary Setting Game for Teens. The game is hosted at: https://www.figma.com/make/2G9H9FkHp10em4HtzI1AXl/Boundary-Setting-Game-for-Teens?t=U3cianwoGcEygXpy-20&fullscreen=1 — embed it via an <iframe> with fullscreen support enabled (allow='fullscreen'). If iframe embedding is blocked by Figma, fall back to a prominent styled call-to-action button that opens the link in a new tab.
Add a 'Play the Game' navigation item to the sticky header so users can jump directly to the game section from anywhere on the page, consistent with the existing smooth-scroll navigation pattern.
